title: senecio cornu-cervi
intro: Senecio cornu-cervi, also known as Deer's Horn Plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio cornu-cervi include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its dried leaves can also be used in soups and stews to leverage its medicinal properties.
